reason: Configuring system cryptography policy via update-crypto-policies is a standard STIG hardening measure that enforces strong cryptographic algorithms. It follows established patterns for security enhancement and is unlikely to cause lockout or system breakage when applied correctly, as the tool is integrated into RHEL for safe policy management.
estimated_impact: authentication/authorization affected; networking affected; Security hardening; Potential service disruption if legacy applications rely on deprecated ciphers
